reasoning.research_depth: Deep technical knowledge demonstrated through hands-on hardware exploration. Shows genuine understanding of electronic components and audio engineering principles.
reasoning.signal_noise: Excellent signal-to-noise ratio. Every segment contributes to understanding the technical subject. Minimal filler or tangents.
reasoning.originality: Distinctive hands-on approach combining hardware teardowns with educational content. The practical demonstration format sets the channel apart.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Strong evergreen potential for hardware and electronics education. The fundamental principles discussed remain relevant over time.
